ops.title: doctor: peer clock-skew probe
ops.description: Add a `cookiesync doctor` check that compares wall clocks across mesh hosts (e.g. via the existing ssh/RPC channel) and flags skew above ~30s. Motivation: the 2026-07-14 cookie-clobber incident — merge is newest-wins on raw `last_update_utc`, so silent clock skew between hosts directly corrupts merge outcomes. The v0.14.1 fix added a converge-side slog.Warn for rows stamped >2min in the future; doctor should surface skew proactively rather than only when bad rows appear.

ops.text: `cookiesync doctor` reports cross-host clock skew, flagging >30s as a warning
